pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh which explicitly checks for this file path.
verifier.py checks if the output file size is >= min_size (which defaults to 15000).

privileged_info_summary: The agent must save a screenshot of the Weasis application showing the localized Lens (Loupe) widget to the exact path /home/ga/DICOM/exports/lens_active.png. The task utilizes a real sample DICOM file downloaded from Rubo Medical (or a generated synthetic one if the download fails). The exported screenshot must be at least 15,000 bytes to be considered a valid, non-empty image.
